/usr/bin/mpicxx -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--unresolved-symbols=ignore-in-shared-libs -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SOC.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/SOC.dir/SOC.cc.o -o SOC
